sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: What Makes InterDigital (IDCC) a New Strong Buy Stock
feed.summary: The article explains why InterDigital (IDCC) has been upgraded to a Strong Buy. It highlights the company's strong earnings estimate revisions, significant price momentum, and status as a Zaks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) stock, suggesting potential for outperformance.

feed.title: Fastenal’s Q4 Report: A Crucial Test for the Industrial Distributor
feed.summary: Fastenal is set to release its Q4 2025 earnings report on January 20, which will be a critical indicator of its ability to counter soft manufacturing volumes with strategic pricing and cost management. Investors are focused on the company's performance, given the challenging industrial landscape and a recent consolidation in its share price. The report will assess if Fastenal's defensive measures are sufficient to meet analyst expectations of approximately $0.26 EPS and $2.05 billion in revenue, potentially influencing its stock direction and validating its long-term growth strategy.

feed.title: KLA (KLAC) is “Terrific,” Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has lauded KLA Corporation (KLAC) as "terrific," following bullish analyst upgrades from Morgan Stanley and TD Cowen. Morgan Stanley upgraded KLAC to Overweight with a $1,694 price target, citing potential revenue growth of 16-19% in 2026-2027, while TD Cowen raised its target to $1,800 and upgraded to Buy, based on optimism in foundry spending. The semiconductor equipment provider has seen its shares rise significantly, driven by strong demand linked to the data center market.

feed.title: Stock Traders Buy High Volume of Put Options on Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH)
feed.summary: Stock traders recently bought a significantly higher volume of put options on Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH), signaling increased bearish sentiment. This occurred alongside recent insider activity where executives acquired company shares and institutional investors adjusted their holdings. The company's stock experienced a slight dip, and analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $27.68.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips cut to Sell equivalent at BofA on high oil breakeven; Ovintiv top oil pick
feed.summary: Bank of America downgraded ConocoPhillips (COP) to Underperform from Neutral with a $102 price target, citing the company's "uncompetitive" $53/bbl oil breakeven point and 4.4% free cash flow yield within the exploration and production (E&P) group. The downgrade caused ConocoPhillips shares to fall 1.1% in Friday's trading. Ovintiv (OVV) was named BofA's top oil pick.

feed.title: Is Quanta Services Inc. the Sleeper Stock About to Explode?
feed.summary: This article examines Quanta Services Inc. (NYSE: PWR), an infrastructure company specializing in power lines, substations, and renewable energy hookups, suggesting it's a "sleeper stock" overlooked by social media but favored by institutional investors. It highlights Quanta's strong positioning due to mega-trends like the energy transition, AI/data center expansion, and grid resilience. The piece advises long-term investors to consider the stock despite its premium valuation, noting its steady growth rather than meme-stock volatility.

feed.title: PNC Financial: Credit Quality And Loan Growth Are Encouraging (NYSE:PNC)
feed.summary: PNC Financial reported strong Q4 results with a 9% revenue increase and EPS of $4.88, driven by Sun Belt expansion and robust credit quality. The bank's balance sheet showed 3% growth in deposits and loans, with an expected 14% rise in net interest income for 2026. Despite a "Hold" rating due to fair valuation, the company maintains strong fundamentals and safe dividends, though the author suggests better upside might exist elsewhere.

feed.title: Raymond James takes large chunk of Merrill team: Advisor Moves
feed.summary: Raymond James has recruited a significant portion of The Thrush-Thrift Group from Merrill in Maryland, including four advisors and a client associate who collectively oversaw an undisclosed portion of the team's $1 billion in assets under management. This move is part of broader industry shifts, with Wells Fargo and Raymond James also attracting advisors from Commonwealth Financial Network following its acquisition by LPL Financial. Additionally, Fifth Third Advisors, RBC, and Integrated Partners secured other recruiting wins, Cetera welcomed back an institutional client, and Elevation Point invested in a UBS breakaway firm.

feed.title: Pfizer: Rebound Has Just Started (NYSE:PFE)
feed.summary: Pfizer (PFE) has begun to rebound, outperforming the S&P 500 largely due to improving fundamentals and renewed share price momentum. Positive pipeline developments and a secure 6.7% forward dividend yield reinforce confidence in its long-term stability and make it an attractive buy. The author maintains a bullish stance on the stock.

feed.title: It's happening. Charlotte's biggest banks are replacing some workers with AI
feed.summary: Charlotte's major banks, Bank of America and Wells Fargo, are increasingly using AI to boost efficiency and reduce their workforce, impacting the city's status as a banking hub. While not always involving layoffs, the banks are cutting expenses through technology investments and being selective in refilling roles, leading to a projected decline in headcount. This shift, driven by AI's ability to automate tasks, raises concerns about potential job displacement in Charlotte's financial sector, though the city's broader job market has shown resilience.

feed.title: HP Inc. Stock Will ‘Remain Pressured’ This Year. It Gets a Downgrade.
feed.summary: Barclays has downgraded HP Inc., predicting that the stock will remain pressured throughout the new year, continuing the challenges faced in 2025. The company's stock experienced a significant 32% decline in 2025. This outlook suggests ongoing difficulties for HP Inc. in the near term.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Susan Connelly Sells Shares of Darden Restaurants Inc (DRI)
feed.summary: Susan Connelly, Senior Vice President at Darden Restaurants Inc (DRI), sold 2,635 shares on January 14, 2026, reducing her holdings to 4,097.862 shares. This transaction follows a pattern of 24 insider sells and no buys over the past year at Darden Restaurants. The stock is currently trading at $207.36 and is considered fairly valued according to its GuruFocus Value.

feed.title: 11 Analysts Assess DuPont de Nemours: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Eleven analysts have recently evaluated DuPont de Nemours (NYSE: DD), with an average price target of $47.55, representing a significant drop from the previous average of $64.18. The company shows a mix of strengths, including strong market capitalization and positive revenue growth, but faces challenges with net margin, return on equity, and return on assets. Analysts' updated ratings and price targets reflect their evolving perceptions of the company's performance and market conditions.

feed.title: I Hope Moderna (MRNA) Posts Growth, Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed hope for Moderna's continued growth, despite past disappointments, following the company's optimistic full-year 2025 revenue guidance increase to $1.9 billion. Moderna also cut operating expenses and increased its cash balance estimate. Analysts from Jefferies and RBC Capital maintained neutral ratings, with RBC highlighting Moderna's phase three melanoma trial as a key 2026 catalyst.

feed.title: Dominion Energy up after US judge allows Virginia offshore wind project to resume
feed.summary: Dominion Energy's stock is up following a U.S. judge's decision to allow the Virginia offshore wind project to resume. This news, reported by Reuters, is presented as a headline only, without additional textual details.

feed.title: Fresh Del Monte acquires assets from Del Monte Foods
feed.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. has acquired various assets from Del Monte Foods Corp., including its vegetable, tomato, and refrigerated fruit businesses. This acquisition follows Del Monte Foods Corp.'s court-supervised auction process, where Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. was one of three successful bidders for substantially all of the company's assets and business operations. The acquired brands include Del Monte and S&W packaged vegetables, Del Monte, Contadina, and Take Root Organics packaged tomatoes, Del Monte refrigerated fruit, and the JOYBA beverage brand.

feed.title: Gevo Names Alex Clayton Chief Carbon Officer to Lead Gevo’s Carbon Market Expansion
feed.summary: Gevo, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEVO) announced the appointment of Alex Clayton as Chief Carbon Officer, transitioning from his previous role as Chief Business Development Officer. This move supports Gevo's growth plan and its focus on expanding in the voluntary carbon markets, where it produces carbon dioxide removal credits. Gevo highlights its North Dakota facility as a major producer of engineered carbon dioxide removal credits with thousand-year permanence.

feed.title: Dermatologist-backed water filters hit shelves at 1,800 Target stores
feed.summary: Filterbaby, a skincare water filtration brand, has launched its new Essential Collection in over 1,800 Target stores and on Target.com in January 2026. This expansion includes faucet and shower filters designed to remove up to 99.9% of skin-irritating contaminants, reinforcing Target's focus on wellness and beauty. The products are priced at $69.99 for the faucet filter and $49.99 for the shower filter, aiming for accessibility and leveraging dermatologist backing and industry awards.

feed.title: Charles Schwab stock hits all-time high at 104.77 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) stock has reached an all-time high of $104.77, marking a 37.75% increase over the past year and giving the company a market capitalization of $186 billion. InvestingPro data indicates a P/E ratio of 24.5 and a 1.05% dividend yield, with analysts revising earnings expectations upward before the January 21 earnings report. The company has also maintained dividend payments for 37 consecutive years, and its price target has been raised by Citizens and Raymond James, reflecting strong financial outlook and investor confidence.

feed.title: McKesson (MCK) is a Stock That “Defies The President,” Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) as a stock that is performing well despite political pressures to lower healthcare pricing. The financial firm Deutsche Bank recently raised MCK's price target to $904 from $861 maintaining a Buy rating, while TD Cowen also kept a Buy rating with a $1,000 target. The company's shares gained 42% over the past year, indicating strong performance even as Cramer noted potential risks from presidential efforts to cut out middlemen in healthcare.

feed.title: Gartner Announces Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026
feed.summary: Gartner has announced its Data & Analytics Summit 2026, scheduled for March 9-11, 2026, in Orlando, Fla. The summit will focus on leveraging data's full potential amidst the accelerating changes brought by AI, addressing challenges such as scaling AI, managing disruption, and balancing risk with governance. The event will feature over 60 Gartner experts, 137 research-driven sessions, and target C-level leaders, AI heads, data management infrastructure managers, and chief data/analytics officers.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) CEO Isn't Ready For A Fight With RFK Jr., Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer suggests that Pfizer's CEO, Dr. Bourla, is not prepared for a confrontation with RFK Jr. regarding vaccines, implying RFK Jr. would prevail in such a debate. This commentary comes as Pfizer faces challenges with upcoming patent expirations and a projected dip in coronavirus vaccine sales, despite some positive drug pipeline data. Cramer highlighted the vaccine business being "under fire" and that some of Pfizer's important vaccines might be questioned.

feed.title: Howard Silverblatt Retiring After Nearly 49 Years at S&P Global
feed.summary: Howard Silverblatt, a long-serving analyst at S&P Global Inc., is retiring at the end of January 2026 after a distinguished career spanning nearly 49 years. Having started in May 1977, Silverblatt became a respected stock index analyst on Wall Street and will retire as he approaches his 72nd birthday. His departure marks the end of an almost five-decade tenure with the index provider.

feed.title: US judge grants Dominion bid to restart Virginia offshore wind project
feed.summary: A US judge has granted Dominion Energy permission to restart its Virginia offshore wind project. This decision follows a period where the project was halted, which previously drew concern from analysts regarding potential cost pressures for Dominion. The ruling allows the project to move forward and reverses a previous block related to a prior administration.

feed.title: US judge grants Dominion bid to restart Virginia offshore wind project
feed.summary: A federal judge has ruled in favor of Dominion Energy, allowing the company to resume work on its Virginia offshore wind project. This decision overturns a previous halt by the Trump administration, marking the third legal defeat for the administration's offshore wind policy this week. Government attorneys had cited classified national security information as the reason for the pause.

feed.title: CRWV Investor Alert: A Securities Fraud Class Action
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against CoreWeave, Inc. (CRWV) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that CoreWeave made materially false and misleading statements regarding its ability to meet customer demand and underestimated the risks associated with relying on a single third-party data center supplier. Investors who suffered significant losses are encouraged to contact the firm by the lead plaintiff deadline of March 13, 2026.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Awards $1.4 Million Grant to Salida School District for Electric Buses
feed.summary: Xcel Energy has granted $1.4 million to the Salida School District to facilitate its transition to electric transportation. The grant will fund the purchase of two electric school buses and two fast-charging stations. These buses will not only reduce emissions and operating costs but also provide backup power to school facilities during outages, enhancing energy resilience and emergency preparedness.

feed.title: Charles Schwab stock hits all-time high at 104.77 USD
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corp (NYSE:SCHW) stock has reached an all-time high of $104.77, marking a significant 37.75% increase over the past year. The company boasts a market capitalization of $186 billion, with a P/E ratio of 24.5 and a dividend yield of 1.05%, according to InvestingPro data. Analysts have revised earnings expectations upward ahead of its January 21 earnings report, and the company has maintained dividend payments for 37 consecutive years, indicating strong financial stability and investor confidence.

feed.title: Focus On Amazon (AMZN)’s Retail Business As Well, Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer emphasizes that investors should pay close attention to Amazon's retail business, not just AWS, when analyzing the stock. He notes that Walmart is proving to be a strong challenger in the e-commerce space with its robust delivery initiatives and widespread presence. Cantor Fitzgerald recently cut Amazon's price target, while Jefferies raised its target, highlighting the strength of AWS and its exposure to AI inference opportunities.

feed.title: MDA Space stock soars nearly 14% on Morgan Stanley upgrade
feed.summary: MDA Space (MDA.TO) shares surged nearly 14% after Morgan Stanley upgraded the Canadian satellite and communications firm to "overweight" from "equal-weight," raising its price target to $46 from $32. Analysts believe the company offers attractive value as a profitable space pure-play, despite past concerns about contract cancellations and potential competition from SpaceX. The upgrade follows MDA's new contract with the U.S. Missile Defense Agency for the SHIELD program, signaling multiple pathways for MDA's involvement in foreign defense initiatives.

feed.title: Riot Platforms Sells 1080 BTC to Expand in AI
feed.summary: Riot Platforms has expanded its data center business by acquiring an 81-hectare plot for $96 million near its Texas data center, financed by selling 1080 BTC. The company will provide AI computing capacities to AMD, leveraging its infrastructure and increasing its power supply portfolio to 1.7 GW. This move highlights a broader trend among mining companies, including CleanSpark and Core Scientific, to pivot towards AI services, with significant investments and partnerships in the sector.

feed.title: Prudential Life reports 500 customers bilked in funds scandal
feed.summary: Prudential Life Insurance Co. has revealed that approximately 100 employees fraudulently obtained 3.14 billion yen ($20 million) from about 500 customers through fictitious investment schemes and unreturned loans. President and CEO Kan Mabara will resign to take responsibility, as the company publicly apologized for the scandal. This follows a previous resignation by the parent company's chairman in October 2025 related to similar issues, and an ongoing internal investigation initiated after an employee's arrest in June 2024.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lowers Price Target for CZR to USD 27.00 | CZR St
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Stephen Grambling has lowered the price target for Caesars Entertainment (CZR) to $27.00 from $29.00, while maintaining an "Equal-Weight" rating. This adjustment reflects a 6.90% decrease in the price target. Despite this, the average target price from 20 analysts is $35.61, implying a significant upside from the current price, and GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $43.32, suggesting an even greater upside.

feed.title: Aerospace Biz TransDigm Gets 2 PE-Backed Cos. In $2.2B Deal
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Inc., an aircraft parts manufacturer, announced its intent to acquire private equity-backed Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings. The deal is valued at approximately $2.2 billion in cash. This acquisition reflects TransDigm's continued expansion within the aerospace market.

feed.title: TransDigm Group Incorporated signed a binding Stock Purchase Agreement to acquire Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings LLC and Jet Parts Engineering, LLC from Vance Street Management LLC for $2.2 billion.
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated has signed a binding Stock Purchase Agreement to acquire Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings LLC and Jet Parts Engineering, LLC from Vance Street Management LLC for $2.2 billion. The aerospace aftermarket deal involves a cash consideration, with the acquired companies reporting combined total revenue of $280 million for the period ending December 31, 2025. The transaction is contingent on regulatory approval, with various financial and legal advisors involved.

feed.title: Bank Of America CEO Warns $6 Trillion Could Flee To Stablecoins—Here's Why Banks Are Terrified
feed.summary: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan has warned that interest-bearing stablecoins could lead to a $6 trillion exodus of deposits from traditional banks, forcing them to rely on more expensive wholesale funding. This concern is highlighted by a proposed Senate bill that bans interest on merely holding stablecoins but allows activity-based rewards, a compromise that crypto firms like Coinbase are opposing. The legislative battle will determine whether crypto can directly compete with banks for deposits, posing a significant threat to banks' lending capacity and profit margins.

feed.title: Intuit TurboTax opens flagship store in NYC SoHo
feed.summary: Intuit TurboTax has opened its new flagship store in New York City's SoHo neighborhood, marking the nationwide launch of nearly 600 Expert Office locations and 20 new TurboTax Stores. This expansion combines advanced AI technology with human expertise to offer a seamless, "done for you" tax experience for individuals and small businesses. The company aims to redefine tax filing by providing personalized guidance, automating tax preparation, and offering year-round financial control through a blend of digital and physical services.

feed.title: Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) Shares Gap Down on Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Shares of The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) gapped down after Oppenheimer downgraded the stock from an "outperform" to "market perform" rating. The stock opened at $26.48, down from its previous close of $27.58, and was trading about 4.5% lower on heavy volume. Despite the downgrade, the consensus rating for Mosaic remains "Hold" with a target price of $31.07, and the company recently reported an EPS beat though it missed revenue expectations.

feed.title: Via Renewables Announces a Redemption of 232,708 Shares of Its 8.75% Series a Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
feed.summary: Via Renewables, Inc. announced its intention to redeem 232,708 shares of its 8.75% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. The redemption price is $25.00 per share plus accumulated and unpaid dividends of $0.24090 per share, with the redemption date set for February 17, 2026. The company advises that all Series A Preferred Stock are in book-entry form and the redemption will follow DTC's procedures.

feed.title: Textron Inc. Stock (TXT) Opinions on 52-Week High and Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (TXT) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $94.59, driven by strong performance in aerospace and defense and an analyst upgrade from Jefferies to $115. Insider selling and congressional trading activity are noted, alongside significant institutional investor moves and robust Q3 2025 revenues of $3.6 billion. Several firms have issued buy ratings, with a median price target of $97.0 among recent analyst reports.

feed.title: PNC's FirstBank acquisition metrics exceed expectations, CEO Demchak says
feed.summary: PNC's CEO, Bill Demchak, announced that the bank's acquisition of FirstBank is exceeding initial expectations. This positive news comes as PNC reported record fourth-quarter revenue, with strong growth projections for 2026 largely attributed to the newly integrated FirstBank operations.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Financial Companies: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) and SelectQuote (SLQT)
feed.summary: This article discusses analyst sentiments on two financial companies: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) and SelectQuote (SLQT). Morgan Stanley maintained a Hold rating on ICE with a $180 price target, while Craig-Hallum and Noble Financial both maintained Buy ratings on SLQT with price targets of $6.00 and $7.00 respectively. The consensus for ICE is a Strong Buy, and for SLQT, it is a Moderate Buy.

feed.title: The Top Stories in Construction: Intuit QuickBooks & NVIDIA
feed.summary: This article highlights key developments in the construction industry, focusing on how Intuit QuickBooks aids construction firms in financial management, the launch of Central Africa's first modular office project by CIMC MBS, Johnson & Johnson's significant investment in pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities, and the rapid progression of Saudi Arabia's Jeddah Tower. It also details an expanded partnership between Caterpillar and NVIDIA to integrate physical AI into manufacturing and construction equipment.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical: Buying The Dip On This Wide-Moat Compounder (NASDAQ:ISRG)
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) continues to demonstrate robust double-digit growth, driven by strong adoption of its da Vinci 5 system. Despite a recent share sell-off due to 2026 procedure growth guidance that fell short of expectations, the company's operational strength and market dominance warrant a "Buy" rating. The author recommends tactical buying on dips for long-term growth investors, citing accelerating system placements and significant long-term upside potential.

feed.title: Campbell's (CPB) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of Campbell's (CPB) fell 3% after multiple financial institutions expressed caution, lowering price targets, and Fitch Ratings downgraded the company's long-term debt. Analysts cited concerns about near-term challenges in snacking categories and projected a decline in earnings for fiscal 2026. The stock is down 5.7% year-to-date and 37.8% below its 52-week high.

feed.title: BofA Touts Uber Technologies Inc. (UBER) Prospects in Autonomous Vehicles on Nvidia Partnership
feed.summary: BofA Securities has reiterated a Buy rating on Uber Technologies Inc. (UBER) with a $119 price target, citing the company's strong positioning in the autonomous vehicle market through a strategic partnership with Nvidia. This collaboration is expected to accelerate Level 4 autonomous technology adoption by lowering entry barriers for OEMs, thus benefiting Uber's network with more autonomous vehicles. Bernstein SocGen analysts also maintain an Outperform rating and a $115 price target on Uber stock, despite increasing competition in the AV market.

feed.title: Will Rising Institutional Ownership And 2025 Results Preview Change Fortis' (TSX:FTS) Narrative
feed.summary: Fortis Inc. (TSX:FTS) is set to release its 2025 financial results on February 12, 2026, accompanied by a CEO and CFO webcast. Growing institutional interest, particularly from LARGE CAP INTERNATIONAL PORTFOLIO, highlights the appeal of Fortis's regulated, dividend-focused business model. The upcoming results will provide critical clarity on the company's capital investments, interest costs, and regulatory outcomes, which are key to its short-term financial narrative given its substantial capital spending and associated leverage.

feed.title: Forward Industries (NASDAQ: FWDI) Building the World’s Largest Solana Treasury Company
feed.summary: Forward Industries (NASDAQ: FWDI) is building the world's largest Solana treasury company, holding over 6.9 million Solana (SOL) and actively participating in the Solana ecosystem. The company employs a strategy of acquiring more SOL and deploying assets strategically through staking, lending, and decentralized finance (DeFi), guided by a team with extensive industrial experience and a rigorous institutional risk management framework.

feed.title: Erasca Offers $7.50 Put Option, Attracting Investor Interest
feed.summary: Erasca is attracting investor interest with its $7.50 put option, allowing investors to effectively buy shares at a 22% discount. The article highlights potential returns for investors, including a 5.33% cash return if the put option expires worthless, and a 20.29% total return with a $10.00 call option strategy. Despite high implied volatility, analyst price targets for ERAS stock suggest a potential decline over the next 12 months, with an average target of $4.50.

feed.title: The JPM Effect In Short Supply But BioAge And Bayer Gain
feed.summary: The J.P. Morgan conference this year saw a more optimistic mood despite a lack of significant deals or major catalysts emerging. While the overall "JPM Effect" (a surge in activity or announcements) was in short supply, BioAge and Bayer AG specifically gained attention. The article highlights that the mood was upbeat even without many positive developments in terms of deals.
